rulings.Case Title: LESLIE MATHEWS VS. WILLIAM F GARLOCK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 13, 2011, line 3. PLAINTIFFS LESLIE MATHEWS, PETER MATHEWS, LESLIE MATHEWS AND PETER MATHEWS AS TRUSTEES' Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions. Motion granted. Sanctions in the amount of $3165.75 to be paid by Mr. Eshoo to plaintiff's counsel. =(302/LMG)
